svg.text: Fig5 donor-recipient ribbon draft: PAN027 paternal hap2 vs father PAN011
Recipient subtelomeric windows are PAN027#2; donor loci are PAN011 joint-haplotype intervals that win over the same-chromosome/homolog match.
Ribbons use IMPG class-winning 2 kb windows; each donor row is one 500 kb PAN011 window containing one or more winning donor intervals.
Ribbons use IMPG class-winning 2 kb windows; each donor row is one 500 kb PAN011 window containing one or more winning donor intervals.
Grey singletons not ribboned as donor rows: chr11 h2 4 kb, chr17 h2 4 kb, chr19 h2 2 kb, chr6 h1 2 kb, chr6 h2 14 kb, chr7 h1 2 kb, chr8 h2 2 kb
Ribbons use IMPG class-winning 2 kb windows; each donor row is one 500 kb PAN011 window containing one or more winning donor intervals.
Grey singletons not ribboned as donor rows: chr11 h1 4 kb, chr19 h2 6 kb, chr7 h2 2 kb
